vertical_split_selection.sort_order: descending by non_pk_column_count, then table name

fragment_roles: rows where Segment = LAM + rows where Segment = KAM or is NULL
customers.fragment_role_B: rows where Segment = LAM + rows where Segment = KAM or is NULL

base_predicate_sqls: (("ChainID" IS NOT NULL AND "ChainID" > 3 AND "ChainID" <= 6) OR ("ChainID" IS NOT NULL AND "ChainID" > 6 AND "ChainID" <= 33))
fragment_roles: rows where 3 < ChainID <= 6 + rows where 6 < ChainID <= 33
rows where ChainID > 33 or is NULL
gasstations.fragment_role_B: rows where 3 < ChainID <= 6 + rows where 6 < ChainID <= 33

fragment_roles: rows where Amount > 27 or is NULL

relocation_engine_debug.pair_weight_meaning: Weights count co-occurrences of two fragments (from different original tables) inside workload queries that already span 2+ locals. They rank relocation candidates; they do not equal the number of queries that will become single-local after a move.
